title: Fix empty input crash
body: Calling `parse_items("")` should return an empty list instead of failing downstream.

comments.author: maintainer
comments.body: This shows up in onboarding examples when the input box is empty.

title: Improve README quickstart
body: The quickstart should explain install and test commands for new contributors.

title: Add missing unit tests for parser
body: We need coverage for whitespace trimming and empty input behavior.
